prompt: A futuristic megacity at night viewed from descending spacecraft, 200mm telephoto compressing the distance between thousands of lit towers layers — the city appears impossibly dense, flying vehicles in organized lanes in organized streams tracing luminous lines through the frame, atmospheric haze and accumulated light pollution glowing with no single source, 16:9. Create this as a simple low-resolution thumbnail-style cinematic still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
